description:
Advances: mutagen.ast, mutagen.scope_resolution

Deliverable:
1. New module `lib/mutagen_ex/ast.ex` with the three public helpers from `mutagen.ast` (`alias_to_module/1`, `find_module_body/2`, `node_line/1`).
2. Delete the private duplicates from `lib/mutagen_ex/scope_resolver.ex`, `lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_enumerator.ex`, and `lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_runner.ex`. Each donor module routes through `MutagenEx.Ast.<fn>` instead.
3. Wrap `Path.wildcard(@default_source_glob)` in `scope_resolver.ex:698` with `Enum.sort/1` to close the F30 determinism risk for module-name targets.
4. Commit bench fixture at `priv/helper_scripts/bench_fixtures/wrd25_200sites/` (a small Elixir tree with ~200 mutation sites, plus a colocated test suite). Suggested shape: 3-5 small modules with arithmetic, boolean, and case-clause densities representative of typical app code.
5. Skeleton `priv/helper_scripts/bench_ast_perf.exs` that runs the wrd25 fixture twice and reports wall-clock + memory deltas. S6 completes the harness; this commit just lays the scaffolding.
6. Re-target `test/mutagen_ex/determinism_test.exs` (from S0) to the wrd25 fixture.
7. Revise `.spec/specs/scope_resolution.spec.md` to mention the sorted-wildcard determinism contract (add a requirement or revise an existing one).

Verification:
- Tests to pass: `mix test` green; `mix test --include e2e_slow test/mutagen_ex/determinism_test.exs` green; new tests `test/mutagen_ex/ast_test.exs` and `test/mutagen_ex/ast_donor_equivalence_test.exs` green
- Behaviors to demonstrate: mutagen.ast.s1-s9 (every scenario in the new spec); the spec-verification stubs mutagen.ast.v1/v2/v3
- Mechanical: `grep -rn "defp alias_to_module\\|defp find_module_body" lib/mutagen_ex/` returns empty (mutagen.ast.v2)

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/mutagen_ex/ast_cache.ex (S2 owns)
- lib/mutagen_ex/mutators/** (S3 owns)
- lib/mutagen_ex/beam_cache.ex (S5 owns; should not exist yet)
- lib/mutagen_ex/test/code_server.ex (S5 owns; should not exist yet)
- lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_runner.ex prewalk batching (S4 owns; lifting helpers IS in scope)
Allowed touches (this stage may modify):
- lib/mutagen_ex/ast.ex (new)
- lib/mutagen_ex/scope_resolver.ex
- lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_enumerator.ex
- lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_runner.ex (delete duplicates; do not touch prewalk batching)
- priv/helper_scripts/bench_fixtures/wrd25_200sites/** (new)
- priv/helper_scripts/bench_ast_perf.exs (new skeleton)
- test/mutagen_ex/ast_test.exs (new)
- test/mutagen_ex/ast_donor_equivalence_test.exs (new)
- test/mutagen_ex/determinism_test.exs (re-target)
- .spec/specs/scope_resolution.spec.md
- .spec/specs/ast.spec.md (status: draft -> draft; no edit needed if already authored by /distill)
- README.md
- CHANGELOG.md

Out of Scope (intent):
- Do not change the AST cache (S2). Existing AstCache.load/2 stays exactly as-is.
- Do not introduce head-atom dispatch (S3) or batched prewalk (S4).
- Do not add new public helpers to MutagenEx.Ast beyond r1/r2/r3 (no scope creep into general-purpose AST utility).
- Do not refactor caller-specific helpers in donor modules (compute_end_position/1, walk_bare/N, etc. stay where they are).
- F19 (TestSelector tag cache) is descoped per mutagen.decision.f19_descoped — do not touch test_selector.ex.

Merge gate:
- [ ] `mix compile --warnings-as-errors` green
- [ ] `mix test` green
- [ ] Determinism test green (`make smoke` includes it for this stage)
- [ ] mutagen.ast.v2 grep returns empty (no remaining duplicates)
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket

Commit: `mutagen-wrd.25.01: MutagenEx.Ast lift + Path.wildcard sort + bench fixture`
title: S1: MutagenEx.Ast lift + Path.wildcard sort + bench fixture
